violations.text: The menu does not contain an allergen warning for consumers. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024

Parfaits packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC removed items from retail area and placed in display cooler where only employees have access to. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
